Concept Values Rituals Menu Our Cities Manifesto Contact

Born from the same ground

Common Ground is a coffee, bakery, and flower shop rooted in the idea that coffee, flour, and flowers all begin in the same place: the earth. Placed in different cities around the world, each café is inspired by the symbolic flower of its location — Milan blooms through magnolia, Paris through iris, London through rosebay, and Amsterdam through tulip.

The brand turns everyday rituals — drinking coffee, sharing bread, buying flowers — into poetic experiences of place, connection, and belonging.

“Born from the same ground, coffee, bread, and flowers come together to celebrate the spirit of each city.”

What we grow toward

Mission & Vision

Mission

To cultivate a space where flowers, coffee, and baking coexist beautifully, creating living experiences where the spirit of wild blooms shape every detail — creating moments of connection rooted in passion, service, community, and the celebration of life.

Vision

To become a distinctive brand experience where floral culture transforms the way people gather, eat, and drink coffee. Inspiring a deeper connection with nature, community, and the beauty of balanced living through every cup, every bite, and every bloom.

Core Values

The roots from which we grow

They shape every flavor, every flower, and every moment of warmth, connection, and life we offer.

Passion

Is the care behind every detail. It shows in the craft, creativity, and love placed into each product and experience.

Life

Brings freshness, energy, and movement to the brand. It reflects the beauty of nature and makes the space feel vibrant and full of feeling.

Balance

Means harmony between coffee, flowers, and baking. It creates a space that feels calm, warm, and alive at the same time.

Community

Is about bringing people together. Common Ground is a place where people can connect, share moments, and feel at home.

Service

Is warm, thoughtful, and attentive. It means making each person feel welcomed, valued, and cared for.

The experience blooms through three rituals

Sip · Share · Carry

Coffee

To Sip

Warm drinks inspired by the city's flower, made for slow mornings and quiet pauses.

Bakery

To Share

Fresh pastries and breads that feel golden, handmade, and comforting.

Flowers

To Carry

Seasonal bouquets and floral details that extend the experience beyond the café and into daily life.

Our Menu

brews · bites · blooms

A poetic garden of names, descriptions, and local floral references.

brews

First Bloom Espresso2,00
A espresso with a clean finish and concentrated, like the first opening petal.
Rooted Americano4,00
Espresso softened with hot water for a longer, lighter cup with depth and clarity, grounded like roots beneath a garden.
Velvet Petal Cappuccino4,50
A classic cappuccino with a soft, clouded foam, airy as tulip petals, warm as a morning in bloom.
Stem & Silk Latte4,00
Espresso and steamed milk in a smooth, balanced cup, inspired by the gentle line of stems and the softness of magnolia petals.
Garden Mocha5,00
Dark chocolate and espresso folded into warm milk, deep and floral in feeling, like roses blooming at dusk.
Bloom Macchiato2,00
Espresso marked with a small crown of milk foam, simple, sharp, and graceful.
Petali di Milano
Espresso, steamed milk, vanilla bean, and a soft jasmine finish. — our signature bloom brew

bites

Magnolia Cloud Cornetto5,00
Laminated pastry with lemon cream and mascarpone.
Petal Fold Cake6,00
Almond sponge with raspberry glaze and pale pink icing.
Duomo Blossom Tart5,50
Ricotta tart with poached pear and vanilla.
Bread — da 8 /kg  ·  Focaccia 2,50  ·  Croissant 4,00  ·  Girella 3,20  ·  Pain au chocolat 3,50  ·  Cinnamon bun 4,00  ·  Danish pastry sweet / salty 4,00  ·  Matcha cookie 3,00  ·  Cake 4,50  ·  Yogurt with granola 1,50  ·  Cookie 2,00

blooms available anytime during our operating hours

MILANO — Magnolia
A soft bouquet of pink magnolia, ranunculus, sweet peas, and delicate seasonal greenery.
PARIS — Iris
A refined bouquet of iris, garden roses, lisianthus, and touches of soft foliage.
LONDON — Rosebay
A wild bouquet of rosebay, scabiosa, waxflower, and loose meadow greenery.
AMSTERDAM — Tulip
A fresh bouquet of tulips, hyacinths, anemones, and bright seasonal foliage.

*All brews can be made with substitute milks, subject to availability: almond, coconut, soy. *Our bites are prepared in a kitchen that handles gluten, dairy, eggs, nuts, soy, and other allergens. Please let our team know about any allergies or dietary requirements before ordering.

Our Cities

Each city brings its own blossom

The brand territory is the everyday bloom — a place where simple moments begin to flower. Each café feels connected to its city and its local flower.

Milano
Magnolia

Milan is a city of quiet elegance — precise, structured, and deeply refined. The magnolia blooms like soft silk against stone streets, design studios, and timeless architecture, where every detail feels composed: coffee, bread, and flowers arranged with grace.

A magnolia morning in Milan — soft petals, warm coffee, quiet design.

Bouquet — pink magnolia, ranunculus, sweet peas, and delicate seasonal greenery.

Paris
Iris

Paris is a city of art, romance, and lingering moments. The iris unfolds like a painted memory, carrying the softness of poetry, perfume, and morning light — a place for slow conversations, delicate pastries, and coffee rituals that feel intimate, graceful, and timeless.

Paris unfolds like an iris — a coffee made for lingering.

Bouquet — iris, garden roses, lisianthus, and touches of soft foliage.

London
Rosebay

London is a city of grey skies, rain, movement, and unexpected warmth. The rosebay blooms with resilience, bringing colour to brick, fog, and weather — a shelter in the city, where coffee warms the hands, bread softens the day, and flowers bloom through the rain.

A rosebay in the rain — where grey skies bloom warm.

Bouquet — rosebay, scabiosa, waxflower, and loose meadow greenery.

Amsterdam
Tulip

Amsterdam is a city of canals, bicycles, open skies, and bright colour. The tulip rises with simplicity and joy, bringing freshness to the city's rhythm — a bright pause beside the water, where coffee, bread, and flowers feel light, alive, and full of morning.

Amsterdam opens in tulip colour — a bright bloom beside the water.

Bouquet — tulips, hyacinths, anemones, and bright seasonal foliage.

Ground note!

All of our bouquets and single stems can be made into a personal arrangement, crafted with your chosen flowers, colours, and feeling in mind. Let your creativity Bloom!

Manifesto

The everyday bloom

We believe every city has a flower — a bloom that carries its rhythm, its weather, its light, its quiet beauty. We believe coffee, bread, and flowers are not separate things, but small rituals born from the same earth.

Coffee warms the hands. Bread gathers people around the table. Flowers carry feelings home.

Common Ground is a place where these rituals meet — a place to pause in the middle of the city, to feel rooted, even for a moment, where mornings rise, petals open, and people gather.

From Milan to Paris, from London to Amsterdam, every city blooms in its own way.

This is Common Ground. The everyday bloom.

Where everyday moments bloom. A soft pause in the rhythm of the city. Let the day unfold, petal by petal. Small rituals, softly flowering. The city blooms here. A place to gather, grow, and bloom. Where everyday moments bloom. A soft pause in the rhythm of the city. Let the day unfold, petal by petal. Small rituals, softly flowering. The city blooms here. A place to gather, grow, and bloom.

rooted in nature, shaped by connection.
